{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/8165968?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/SamyGhannad", "id": 8165968, "login": "SamyGhannad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjgxNjU5Njg=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/SamyGhannad", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44283", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-863", "name": "Incorrect Authorization"}], "description": "### Impact
_What kind of vulnerability is it? Who is impacted?_

A vulnerability in etcd allows read access via PrevKv, or lease attachment in Put requests within transaction operations, to bypass RBAC authorization checks. An authenticated user without sufficient read or lease-related permissions may be able to access unauthorized data or attach leases by invoking transaction operations with these features enabled.

Kubernetes does not rely on etcd’s built-in authentication and authorization. Instead, the API server handles authentication and authorization itself, so typical Kubernetes deployments are not affected.

### Patches
_Has the problem been patched? What versions should users upgrade to?_

This vulnerability is patched in the following versions:
- etcd 3.6.11
- etcd 3.5.30
- etcd 3.4.44

### Workarounds
_Is there a way for users to fix or remediate the vulnerability without upgrading?_

If upgrading is not immediately possible, reduce exposure by treating the affected
RPCs as unauthenticated in practice.

- restrict network access to etcd server ports so only trusted components can connect
- require strong client identity at the transport layer, such as mTLS with tightly scoped client certificate
distribution

### Reporters

Samy Ghannad (@SamyGhannad on Github) reported that read access via PrevKv in a Put request within etcd transactions bypassed RBAC authorization checks. Benjamin Wang (@ahrtr ) further analyzed that lease attachment in a Put request within etcd transactions also bypassed RBAC authorization checks", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00225, "percentile": 0.1289}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-07T03:21:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44283"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T18:16:49Z", "published_at": "2026-05-07T03:21:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/security/advisories/GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44283", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/etcd-io/etcd/security-advisories/GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd", "summary": "etcd RBAC bypass allows unauthorized data access via PrevKv/lease attachment in nested transaction Put requests", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T20:54:32Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x35m-3gp4-4fh5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.6.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.etcd.io/etcd/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.6.0, <= 3.6.10"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.5.30", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.etcd.io/etcd/v3"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.5.0, <= 3.5.29"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.4.44", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "go.etcd.io/etcd"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.4.43"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: etcd RBAC bypass allows unauthorized data access via PrevKv/lease attachment in nested transaction Put requests
